data.label: Internet
data.description: Start by learning the basics of how the internet works. Understand concepts like HTTP/HTTPS, browsers, DNS, and hosting.

data.label: Choose a Language
data.description: Pick a server-side language to be your primary tool. Popular choices include Node.js (JavaScript), Python, Java, Go, and Rust.
objectives: Learn basic syntax and data structures.
Understand how to handle web requests.
Explore the standard library for your chosen language.

data.label: Databases
data.description: Learn how to store and retrieve data. You should understand both SQL (relational) and NoSQL databases.

data.label: APIs
data.description: Learn how to create APIs (Application Programming Interfaces) to allow communication between the client and server.

data.label: Authentication
data.description: Understand how to secure your application by authenticating and authorizing users. Learn about sessions, cookies, JWT, and OAuth.
